commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=04d56915e098c5dca26e59fed229f3d52b576a34)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands `localModelLean` tool filtering, adds focused agent tests, and updates config help plus local-model/Ollama docs.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +55, Docs +7. Total +86 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows current main trims only three tools, while the PR trims the expanded list and omits `sessions_yield` from the explicit docs list. No live local-provider reproduction was needed to verify those review findings.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs human maintainer review for the existing-flag compatibility decision and exact-head CI state; the remaining work is not only a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): broaden local model lean profile
target.body:
## Summary
- Broaden `localModelLean` so small/local models avoid heavyweight web, media, session orchestration, node, channel, and subagent tool families.
- Keep core coding/status tools available in lean mode and cover the retained/trimmed surface with focused tests.
- Refresh config help and local-model docs so the operator-facing contract matches the broader lean profile.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts src/config/plugins-runtime-boundary.test.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --shell -- "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts src/config/plugins-runtime-boundary.test.ts"`

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` previously trimmed only `browser`, `cron`, and `message`, which left many large web/media/channel/orchestration schemas visible to smaller local models.
Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux runner, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_c861bcd44453`, run `run_2b3e568756ea`, branch head `04d56915e0` rebased onto `origin/main` at `837d6a13a2` before push; GitHub is testing the PR merge against the newer live base.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: rebased the branch to current main, kept the diff to the 7 intended lean-profile files, checked docs/format/lint, ran the focused lean/profile/config Vitest set locally, and ran the same focused set remotely through Crabbox.
Evidence after fix: Crabbox Vitest reported 5 files and 55 tests passed; local Vitest reported 5 files and 55 tests passed; docs formatter reported `Docs formatting clean (647 files)`; docs MDX reported `Docs MDX check passed (3 files, 57ms)`; oxfmt and oxlint passed on the touched source/config files.
Observed result after fix: lean mode keeps `read`, `write`, `edit`, `exec`, `apply_patch`, `process`, `session_status`, and `update_plan`, while trimming heavyweight browser/web/media/channel/session/subagent surfaces.
What was not tested: full repo check. Testbox-through-Crabbox is unavailable in this environment because Blacksmith auth is missing, so focused remote proof used the repo AWS Crabbox provider.

Related: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
